name: drawing_exporter_select_sheets
desc: Select or deselect sheets in the Drawing Exporter. Can select by sheet numbers, prefix, discipline, group, or select/deselect all. Mode controls whether selection replaces, adds to, or removes from current selection.

parameters.name: sheet_numbers
parameters.description: JSON array of sheet numbers to select, e.g. [\

parameters.name: by_prefix
parameters.description: Select sheets whose number starts with this prefix, e.g. \

parameters.name: by_discipline
parameters.description: Select sheets matching this discipline, e.g. \

parameters.name: by_group
parameters.description: Select sheets belonging to this group name.
